recommendations.title: Broken
recommendations.overview: Three suburban English families' lives intertwine with tragic consequences.

recommendations.title: The Distinguished Citizen

recommendations.title: Whisper of the Heart
recommendations.overview: Shizuku lives a simple life, dominated by her love for stories and writing. One day she notices that all the library books she has have been previously checked out by the same person: "Seiji Amasawa."

recommendations.title: La Jetée
recommendations.overview: A man confronts his past during an experiment that attempts to find a solution to the problems of a post-apocalyptic world caused by a world war.

recommendations.title: The Wife
recommendations.overview: A wife questions her life choices as she travels to Stockholm with her husband, where he is slated to receive the Nobel Prize for Literature.

recommendations.title: Looks That Kill
recommendations.overview: A teenager lives out the hilarious and often tragic consequences of being lethally attractive, until he meets a girl with a congenital defect.
